name: Bessy Dushime
blurb: Leading HASA to new heights with a focus on community engagement.
bio: Sarah is a junior studying Economics and Government. She has been involved with HASA since her freshman year and is passionate about fostering a strong African community on campus.

name: Joel Kizito
blurb: Supporting the president and ensuring smooth internal operations.
bio: David is a sophomore in Computer Science. He loves organizing events and making sure everyone feels welcome.

name: Jean Yves
blurb: Representing the senior class and alumni relations.
bio: Jean is dedicated to ensuring seniors have a memorable final year and stay connected to the HASA community.

name: Isa Salmanu
blurb: Managing finances and ensuring our events are well-funded.
bio: Amara is a senior in Applied Math. She keeps the books balanced and ensures we can afford the best jollof rice.

name: Helina Tamiru
blurb: Keeping records and communicating with the general body.
bio: Helina is a Junior from Rockville, MD, concentrating in Economics. She is proud of her Ethiopian heritage and dedicated to keeping the community connected.

name: Evelyn Gathara
blurb: Planning the fun stuff! Mixers, parties, and game nights.
bio: Zainab is the life of the party and loves bringing people together through music and dance.

name: Lidya Tadesse
blurb: Spreading the word about HASA events and initiatives.
bio: Kwame is a master of Canva and social media. He makes sure our events are packed.

name: Dandi Desta
blurb: Building and maintaining the HASA website and tech infrastructure.
bio: Dandi is an Electrical Engineering student who loves building systems that work in the real world.

name: Antony Ochieng
blurb: Representing the voice of the first-year class.
bio: Amina is excited to be part of HASA and help new students find their home away from home.

name: Garvin Alimu
blurb: Representing the voice of the first-year class.
bio: Garvin is excited to be part of HASA and help new students find their home away from home.
